nodes.name: Fork-tailed swift
nodes.summary: Fork-tailed swift is the historic name of a kind of bird which has since been divided taxonomically into four species. It could refer to any of four different species of Apus swifts: Pacific swift, Apus pacificus Salim Ali's swift, Apus salimali Blyth's swift, Apus leuconyx Cook's swift, Apus cooki
